messages.content: Hi! We received your application for our Python Developer position. I'm your recruiting assistant — could you tell me a bit about your Python experience?
Hi there! Thanks for reaching out. Can you share more about your experience with Python?
i  have 3 years wxperince. lets scedule
Happy to schedule! Which role are you applying for? (ML Engineer, SQL Developer, Data Analyst, or Python Developer)
Great! Available Python slots: May 26 at 3 PM, 4 PM, or 5 PM. Which works for you?
Your Python Dev interview is confirmed for 2026-05-26 15:00. We look forward to meeting you! You'll receive a calendar invite shortly.
